nodes.label: MIDI Note-On
nodes.description: Note-on stores per-voice EventData for the selected chain

nodes.label: Voice Active Check
nodes.description: Checks ClearState resetFlag per voice. Returns true unless Reset.

nodes.label: Index
nodes.description: Selects which extra modulation chain to monitor (0-16)

nodes.label: Gate Output
nodes.description: 1.0 while voice active, 0.0 when voice released
